Otherwise, this app is perfect. It lets me do everything I want with any MP3’s.
Thank you.

author: Cap can’t apple
title: Worst metadata/tag editor of all time.
content:
DO NOT USE THIS. USE LITERALLY ANYTHING ELSE.

It’s legitimately unbelievable how many ads they cram into a software that does something that can be done on any other device by just selecting the file and hitting edit. 

If IOS wasn’t so ridiculous with how outdated their file management software was, this app wouldn’t even need to exist in the first place.

On top of that, they edit in their own metadata comment upon saving the file that credits their app. Even though, again, the app didn’t do anything special that couldn’t be done on any other device for free as PART of the devices most BASIC FUNCTIONS. 

Lastly, the amount of data this app tracks is INSANE for what this software does.

I reiterate, do not use this app. It’s a scam.

author: ratutat
title: Excellent mp3 metadata editing tool for iOS foobar2000
content: This has been my go to app for the mp3 files that end up with different metadata written to certain mp3 tracks off the same album. When this happens foobar2000 takes the tracks with contradicting metadata and presents them as separate albums in your library which is super annoying to look at. This tool has the ability to edit the metadata of each track individually or I could upload the entire album and do a batch edit all at once..though for some of the more complicated difference’s I still had to go back and edit each one individually. It gets the job done though. I recommend this app.

author: cw4u
title: Super Idee, Dateimanagement katastrophal
content:
Die App scheint zunächst vielversprechend, aber das Dateimanagement ist eine einzige Katastrophe!!
Das Laden eines Ordners dauert ewig (neuestes 2024er iPad Pro, iOS 18.0.1). Es scheint alles irgendwie den Umweg über iCloud zu gehen.
Ordner in iCloud wählen > alles in die App kopieren > mit jedem Klick auf "Speichern" wird eine neue Version erzeugt > dann muss man "hochladen" und man weiß irgendwie gar nicht, welche Dateien verändert werden. Viele Tag-Details werden irgendwie gar nicht gespeichert. Völlig konfus. Nicht nachzuvollziehen was wo passiert und wo die geänderten Dateien landen.

Also so geht das nicht Leute!😟

Ich finde die Idee und das grundsätzliche Interface prima. Aber der korrekte Workflow ist:
- Datei(en) auswählen (egal woher)
- Tags erfassen (einzeln oder für selektierte Dateien)
- Speichern
Fertig!

Nix hin- und herschieben oder hoch- und runterladen. Schon gar nicht, wenn ich mich lokal auf dem iPad bewege.

Ich werde die App erst mal wieder reklamieren und vom Kauf zurücktreten, bis es (hoffentlich bald) ein funktionierendes Update gibt.

2 Sterne weil die Idee gut ist.

===

The app initially seems promising, but sorry to say, file management is an absolute disaster!
Loading a folder (18 .m4a Audio files, each about 4-5 MB in size) in the app takes forever (latest 2024 iPad Pro). Everything somehow seems to go through iCloud, instead being applied locally on the device.
Select a folder in iCloud > copy everything into the app > with every click on “Save,” a new version is created > then you have to “upload,” and you don’t really know which files are being modified where. Many tag details aren’t saved at all. Completely confusing. It’s impossible to understand what’s happening anywhere and the location where the modified files end up.

This is just not acceptable, folks!

I think the idea and the basic interface are great. But the correct workflow should be:

	•	Select file(s) (no matter from which location)
	•	Add tags (individually or for selected files)
	•	Save (optionally choose a different destination folder if needed)
Done!!

No shifting things back and forth, uploading or downloading. Especially not when I’m working locally on the iPad.

I’m going to return the app and ask for a refund until (hopefully soon) there’s a working update.

2 stars because the idea is good.

author: anothersideanotherlexi
title: Useful but buggy
content:
This app is buggy. It seems to have a hard time keeping track of which song it is actually viewing/editing and will display the wrong info at times. While I was trying to edit a song’s title, the app overwrote the entire metadata of one song with another song’s data. I ended up re-downloading the song in question because of it.

It would be extremely helpful to have a spreadsheet-style view, so that I could look at the fields I’m most concerned with on all my songs at a glance. I intend to do some heavy organizing using metadata but that’s a lot harder if I have to check each song one by one. Filtering would be huge for this as well.

author: こんにちはあああ
title: 期待の★x4
content:
素晴らしい。スマホアプリだから、簡単なタグ編集ができればまだ良い方かな…と思っていたのですが、これは良いかもです。

★良い点
まず、楽曲に関する基本的なタグを入れることができます。保存ボタンを押さないと保存されないので注意。

また、主にEDMを聞いているので邦楽で上手くいくかは知らないですが、あらかじめ楽曲の名前とアーティストの名前が入っている楽曲に、ジャケ画やアルバム(シングルならシングルとして出てきます)などを自動で検索して挿入することができます。この機能好こです。

(広告の量も少な…いどころか)ないです。

⭐︎気になった点
検索機能において、個人的にアーティストが複数いる時は「;」で区切っているのですが、複数人だと検知されずに1人のアーティストとして捉えられてしまいます。そのため、上手く編集されなくて困っています。
これに関しては文字コードとかDBとかとの相性なのかな…

また、とても気に入っている検索機能ですが、一つ一つしか編集できません…複数の楽曲をワンボタンで検索できるようになればかなり素晴らしいです。150曲超えてるので手作業は難しそう…　検索機能ですが、before→afterを差分で確認できるようにして、一曲一曲の編集を保存するかを選択できるようになると嬉しいかもです！

content:

FAQ’s appears to reference a tab and options that do not appear in this version of the app.

author: wailt
title: Лучшее приложение, даже при 1м «но»
content: В первых версия приложения при смене обложки она идеально «прописывалась» в файле (если так можно выразиться). Получалось так, что даже загрузив трек в ТГ и включив его, обложка отображалась. Сейчас же работает так: меняю обложку, все сохраняю; в приложении «файлы» при проигрывании трека обложка отображается; в иных приложениях при проигрывании трека на месте обложки пустота. Без понятия, проблема ли это самого Evertag или специфика всех остальных приложений. Но надеюсь и верю, что в ближайшее время доработают этот момент. В остальном - лучшего приложения для моих целей и не придумать. Благодарю разработчиков!

author: faïvvv
title: Please, don’t count on this app for audio tagging unless audio is in MP3 format.
content:
Apple itself (on its website) proposed this app for audio tagging, but frankly I’m very disappointed. The app claims it can tag all audio formats be it MP3, M4A or whatsoever. But it doesn’t!!! MP3 is it’s limit. What adds insult to injury is the fact that I use iOS 16!!! On AndroidOS (on my tablet, there are far more better tagging apps. I really regret having throwing my money because of such minor setbacks ☹️. Wish this review wasn’t just limited to the people in my region!!! Maybe apple could pick up a few more things from Android (like that one). That would help.

Apple lui-même (sur son site) a proposé cette application pour le marquage audio, mais franchement je suis très déçu. L'application prétend qu'elle peut étiqueter tous les formats audio, que ce soit MP3, M4A ou autre. Mais ce n'est pas le cas !!! Le MP3 est sa limite. Ce qui ajoute l'insulte à l'injure, c'est le fait que j'utilise iOS 16 !!! Sur AndroidOS (sur ma tablette, il existe de bien meilleures applications de marquage. Je regrette vraiment d'avoir jeté mon argent à cause de ces revers mineurs ☹️. J'aimerais que cette critique ne se limite pas aux habitants de ma région !!! Peut-être qu'Apple pourrait choisir quelques éléments supplémentaires d'Android. Cela aiderait.

author: DexterTheWulf
title: I can’t thank you enough
content:
I originally tried to go online and do this, but the glitch made it only upload image files only, so I went to the App Store and found this.
At first I was confused on how to do this, but now EVERYTHING makes sense. It literally just edits the file on your phone. No waiting for uploading and downloading, just *snap*, the file's been tagged. Huge dub. 5⭐️.

title: Не работает

author: GrantDerepas
title: Everything except playing music
content:
I was looking for something I could use to go through my music library while on the go, listening to tracks and adding tags/ratings to help me better find tracks later while DJing. 

This app has great controls for editing the tags with more cloud integrations that you can shake a stick at but no way to actually listen to the songs. I would have thought that function was a given.

author: Helen Lang
title: Does the job
content:
Does exactly what i wanted to do. Change mp3 tags without having to open my laptop and use itunes. Fan freaking tastic!!!

Im changing my rating because it edits m4a tags, but then they dont reflect in other appa such as Djay Pro by Algoriddim and Stagetraxx 3. I can only change mp3 tags. Will change back to 5 stars as soon as my m4a’s can be edited too

author: Marty $&@
title: Finally an App for this, but..
content:
Okay first off thank you for someone making an app for this. My hope is this app gains a lot more options for interface settings and tagging ability. I’d write my feedback but the app says I don’t have an email client setup which if it means Apple email that’s true. Things I would like to see 
01. Make the cover art preview for each file bigger, like the wide of the screen bigger.
02. Make tagging for folders as well as files.
03. Add bulk tagging from the root of a folder, what I mean by this is say I’m in the artist folder and have 4 albums but the artist name isn’t correct I want to be able to correct it for all files within this folder.
